settings.title: Same-Day Delivery Service
settings.subtitle: Fast, Reliable Delivery Across Nepal
settings.description: Get your orders delivered the same day in Kathmandu and neighboring areas. Our 99.2% on-time delivery record ensures your products arrive safely and on schedule.

settings.title: Our Delivery Network
settings.content:
Coverage Areas

  • Kathmandu Valley: Same-day delivery for orders before 12 PM (Kathmandu, Bhaktapur, Lalitpur)
  • Greater Kathmandu: Next-day delivery to nearby areas
  • Throughout Nepal: 2-3 business days to all major cities (Pokhara, Biratnagar, Janakpur, Nawal Parasi)

Delivery Pricing

  • Standard Delivery (3-5 days): Free on orders over Rs 500
  • Express Delivery (1-2 days): Rs 150-500 depending on location
  • Same-Day (Same day by 6 PM): Rs 250-800 in Kathmandu Valley

Our Promise

  • ✓ Real-time tracking on all orders
  • ✓ SMS/Email notifications at each stage
  • ✓ Safe, insured packaging
  • ✓ Professional, courteous delivery partners
  • ✓ Easy return/exchange process

settings.liquid:
How Our Delivery Works

1

Order Placed

You place an order on QuickBee. We confirm within 5 minutes

2

Packed

Your items are carefully packed and prepared for delivery

3

Dispatched

Your package is loaded and on its way with real-time tracking

4

Delivered

Package arrives safely with delivery confirmation

settings.title: Delivery Zones & Timing
settings.content:
Kathmandu Valley (Same-Day)

  • Zone 1 (Central): 2-3 hours
  • Zone 2 (East/West): 3-4 hours
  • Zone 3 (Outer areas): 4-5 hours

Greater Kathmandu (Next-Day)

  • Bhaktapur, Lalitpur: 12-18 hours
  • Kavre, Nuwakot: 18-24 hours

Nationwide (2-3 Business Days)

  • Pokhara: 2-3 days
  • Biratnagar: 2-3 days
  • Janakpur: 2-3 days
  • Other cities: Custom quote

Peak Hours & Delays

During peak seasons (festivals, sales events), delivery times may extend by 1-2 days. We're transparent about this and communicate delays immediately.
